title: Conversations UI Implementation Plan
summary: TDD-shaped implementation plan for 10 tasks building the Conversations dashboard with list, detail, archive, and export functionality.
notes: Manifest declared type DOC; honors without requiring heuristic analysis. Implementation plan explicitly TDD-structured with failing tests first (RED), then implementation (GREEN), then commit per task. References spec at line 13; cross-tenant access consistently uses 404 (not 403) per spec at line 39.
